hooks.command: [ -f HALTED ] && echo "GOVERNANCE: repo is HALTED ($(head -c 200 HALTED)). All rituals blocked until the owner clears it."; d=$(date +%F); [ -f "_governance/reports/drift-$d.md" ] || echo 'GOVERNANCE: no drift report today — run /drift-check'; find _governance/reports -name 'audit-*.md' -mtime -7 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo 'GOVERNANCE: last audit >7 days old — run /audit'
